summary: Iteration 57: ZimVie TSX Drilling Protocol Testing - 29/29 tests PASSED (100%). All TSX features verified: dual-kit response (Gold + Original), all 6 diameters, all 5 lengths, bone density protocols, 5.4mm soft bone warning, correct catalog codes, and regression tests for restricted bone height, Ankylos C/X, and Osstem ETIII NH.
critical_code_review_comments: Feature 1 (TSX in available protocols): PASS - Zimmer|TSX listed with correct lengths [8, 10, 11.5, 13, 16]
Feature 2 (Dual kit response): PASS - Both Gold and Original kits returned in response
Feature 4 (3.1mm Dense pilot drill): PASS - First step is pilot with codes 0201G/0201DSN
Feature 5 (3.7mm D1 Dense 4 steps): PASS - 2.3, 2.8, 3.4/2.8 step, implant
Feature 6 (4.1mm D2 Dense 5 steps): PASS - Includes step drill
Feature 7 (4.7mm D3 Soft no step drill): PASS - 5 steps WITHOUT step drill
Feature 8 (5.4mm D4 Soft warning): PASS - Returns warning for no soft bone protocol
Feature 9 (6.0mm D1 Dense 8 steps): PASS - Longest sequence with 5.7/5.1 step drill
Feature 10 (Gold kit codes): PASS - All codes contain 'G' marker
Feature 11 (Original kit codes): PASS - All codes contain 'DN' marker
Feature 12 (Insertion torque): PASS - ≤90 Ncm in notes
Feature 13 (Protocol type labels): PASS - Dense/Soft Bone Protocol (ZimVie TSX)
Feature 14 (All diameters): PASS - 3.1, 3.7, 4.1, 4.7, 5.4, 6.0mm all generate protocols
Feature 15 (All lengths): PASS - 8, 10, 11.5, 13, 16mm all generate protocols with correct depth
REGRESSION (Restricted bone height): PASS - bone_height=8 triggers restricted logic
REGRESSION (Normal suggest-auto): PASS - bone_height=12 uses normal flow
REGRESSION (Ankylos C/X): PASS - Drilling protocol generates correctly with 25-35 Ncm torque
REGRESSION (Osstem ETIII NH): PASS - Drilling protocol generates correctly with ~40 Ncm torque
seed_data_creation: No test data created - read-only tests on drilling protocol generation
context_for_next_testing_agent: ZimVie TSX drilling protocol fully implemented and tested. Key implementation at server.py line 5067-5114 (DRILLING_PROTOCOLS['Zimmer|TSX']) and line 5207-5257 (_generate_tsx_protocol function). Protocol rules: (1) D1/D2 = Dense bone with step drills, (2) D3/D4 = Soft bone without step drills, (3) 5.4mm has NO soft bone protocol (returns warning), (4) Both Driva Gold Series and Driva Drills (Original) kits returned, (5) Gold codes end with 'G', Original codes end with 'DN', (6) Insertion torque ≤90 Ncm. Diameters: 3.1, 3.7, 4.1, 4.7, 5.4, 6.0mm. Lengths: 8, 10, 11.5, 13, 16mm.

tested_endpoints.GET /api/drilling-protocols/available: 200 - TSX listed with correct system_name and lengths
tested_endpoints.POST /api/drilling-protocols/generate: 200 - TSX generates correct protocols for all diameters, lengths, and bone densities
tested_endpoints.POST /api/implant-library/suggest-auto: 200 - Restricted bone height and normal flow both working

key_rules.dual_kit_response: Main steps = Gold kit, alt_protocol = Original kit

regression_tests_verified.restricted_bone_height: bone_height=8 triggers restricted logic with P1/P2 systems
regression_tests_verified.normal_suggest_auto: bone_height=12 uses normal bone type filtering
regression_tests_verified.ankylos_cx: Drilling protocol generates with 25-35 Ncm torque
regression_tests_verified.osstem_etiii_nh: Drilling protocol generates with ~40 Ncm torque
